doghotel

Class Address

  • java.lang.Object
    • doghotel.Address
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<Address>

    public class Address
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Comparable<Address>
    A class to model an U.S.A style address. The address is broken up into sortable bits.

        Returns:

      • compareTo

        public int compareTo(Address that)
        Compares two Addresses. The comparison is initially based on the value of the zipcode which is compared using the Java String compareTo(). Within zip codes, two addresses will be compared by street name which also uses the Java String compareTo(). Within street names, the addresses are compared by street number using the difference of the two numbers (this.number - that.number).
        Specified by:
        compareTo in interface java.lang.Comparable<Address>
        Parameters:
        that - the other Address we are comparing to
        Returns:
        the value 0 if the argument Address is equal to this Address; a value less than 0 if this Address comes before the argument; and a value greater than 0 if this Address comes after argument.
